response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the video: 00:00-00:44 consists of introductory talk, music starts at 00:44. 2. Identified the song title as 'flashpoint' from the live concert. 3. Researched 'flashpoint ReGLOSS lyrics' to obtain song metadata and full lyrics. 4. Confirmed songwriters as oh tora and new k. 5. Extracted and formatted full lyrics for the JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a concert performance by the VTuber group ReGLOSS, consisting of members from Hololive. It begins with an introductory talk by the group members, followed by a full vocal performance of their song 'flashpoint'.

scenes.description: ReGLOSS members introduce themselves on stage and talk to the audience before their performance. No vocal music is playing.
The group performs their song 'flashpoint' on a stage with complex lighting and visual effects. The performers dance and sing throughout.
